coreJobStatement: Design, manufacture, and deliver precision linear motion guide systems that enable accurate, repeatable, load-capable linear travel in industrial machinery and automation equipment
productJobStatement: Help Rail Material Production to supply precision-hardened, near-net-shape guide rail profile stock at IT8 dimensional tolerance (+-0.02 mm) and >=58 HRC surface hardness - consistently across batches - for guide rail grinding and assembly
anchorLevel: L5 (Steel Rail Profile Stock within L6a Rail Material Production)

segments.name: Precision Guide OEM (SP/UP grade)
segments.characteristics: Produces SP/UP accuracy rails at high volume; tightest tolerance requirements
segments.circumstance: Produces SP/UP accuracy rails at high volume; tightest tolerance requirements
segments.alternativesDiffer: Near-net custom profile OR full in-house bar machining

segments.name: Standard Grade Guide OEM (H/P grade)
segments.characteristics: High-volume, cost-driven; grinds down larger allowances
segments.circumstance: High-volume, cost-driven; grinds down larger allowances
segments.alternativesDiffer: Standard bar stock dominant; some hot-rolled blanks

segments.name: Machine Tool OEM (custom slideway)
segments.characteristics: Specifies proprietary rail geometry per platform; low-medium volume
segments.circumstance: Specifies proprietary rail geometry per platform; low-medium volume
segments.alternativesDiffer: Custom profile from specialist; machine from plate

segments.name: Automation System Integrator
segments.characteristics: Buys finished guide rail assemblies; rarely specifies profile stock
segments.circumstance: Buys finished guide rail assemblies; rarely specifies profile stock

alternatives.name: Custom cold-drawn, induction-hardened steel rail profile (near-net-shape)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 6-12 week tooling lead time for new geometry; >=100 kg min batch; steel/stainless only; supplier base limited. ZOLLERN position ~25% share.

alternatives.name: Bearing steel round/flat bar stock (full machining in-house)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 40-80% material waste; high machining cost and cycle time; in-house machine capacity required; lower purchased cost. Dominant ~60% share.

alternatives.name: Hot-rolled special profile + full grinding allowance
alternatives.tradeoffs: +-0.5 mm as-delivered tolerance; larger grinding stock removal; higher risk of profile distortion post-harden. ~15% share.

alternatives.name: Pre-hardened ground flat die steel plate
alternatives.tradeoffs: ~3x material cost; no profile geometry option; only works for flat/dovetail slides (OT5); grade limitations. ~3% share.

alternatives.name: Outsourced finished precision-ground rail profile
alternatives.tradeoffs: Highest unit cost; 4-8 week lead time; limited geometry flexibility; no design-in control. ~2% share.
